features: 【Dusting Powder Puff Set】This set contains 4pcs white powder puff body, the quantity is enough for you to use for different cosmetics and replacement needs can also be provided

【High-quality Material】The body powder puffs are made of high-quality plush and high-elastic sponge, which is light and soft, fluffy and comfortable, skin-friendly and durable. Powderpuff for body powder is suitable for talcum powder, loose powder, body powder, and shading powder

【Powder Puff for Body Size】Powder puffs for body powder are round, with a diameter of 9 cm/3.54 inches and a thickness of 3 cm/1.18 inches. The powder puff for body powder has a thick texture and is about the same size as the palm of your hand, making it easy to hold

【Wide Application】The body puffer for powder is suitable for applying loose powder, talcum powder, talcum powder and other powder products. The soft surface fits the skin and is suitable for face or body

【Easy to Use】The large body powder puff has a bow design on the back for easy holding. Just put in the talcum powder or loose powder and press it where you need it. The large powder puff is simple and convenient, easy to clean and easy to carry
